response.justification: While Bogdan possesses impressive Staff-level engineering experience at top-tier companies and demonstrates excellent leadership and mentoring skills, he falls significantly short of the core technical requirements. The role specifically mandates a minimum of 8 years of C++ programming and deep experience in cloud compute infrastructure, whereas Bogdan's background is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with only a few months of professional C++ experience.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level and Senior engineering experience at major tech companies including Google and Meta.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and establishing engineering best practices.
Proven track record of technical leadership and mentoring through organized workshops, code dojos, and open-source community building.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only about 7 months of professional C/C++ exposure.
Technical background is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development and product engineering rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure.
C++ and core cloud compute infrastructure technologies are notably absent from his primary skills list.
